entity.summary: Commission-free multichain decentralized exchange for spot token trading, operating across Arbitrum, Base, and Ethereum through GammaSwap exchange infrastructure.
entity.notes: Current GammaSwap application endpoint remains reachable. DefiLlama identifies DeltaSwap as a commission-free spot DEX with current TVL and recent volume across Arbitrum, Base, and Ethereum. HEI models DeltaSwap as an exchange entity while preserving its GammaSwap application relationship in aliases and notes. Confidence is medium because a standalone DeltaSwap first-party documentation page was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: GammaSwap application hosting DeltaSwap exchange surface
evidence.notes: Current first-party GammaSwap application endpoint remains reachable and is the application domain associated with the DeltaSwap exchange registry surface.

evidence.title: DeltaSwap metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies DeltaSwap as a commission-free spot DEX and reports current TVL and recent and cumulative DEX volume across Arbitrum, Base, and Ethereum.

evidence.title: DeltaSwap exchange discovery entries
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies DeltaSwap across multiple EVM ecosystems and corroborates the exchange entity identity.
